## Meeting Purpose

  - [First published article showing promising early metrics (avg. position 15.1, CTR 3.9%)](https://fathom.video/share/o1DJ98HyQpWQXm8fUrS_NxN9psskgd1-?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
